# The Screen Report

> The Screen Report covers Hollywood and English-language movies, TV and celebrity culture — fast, accurate explainers, rankings, reviews, watch-orders and "where to watch" guides. AI-assisted newsroom with human editorial standards.

## About
- Site: https://thescreenreport.com
- Scope: Hollywood / English-language film, television and celebrity (not regional/Indian cinema)
- Standards: every story is checked against published Editorial Standards; sources are credible and corroborated; no fabricated quotes or invented facts.

## Sections
- Movies: https://thescreenreport.com/movies/
- TV: https://thescreenreport.com/tv/
- Streaming: https://thescreenreport.com/streaming/
- Celebrity: https://thescreenreport.com/celebrity/
- Reviews: https://thescreenreport.com/reviews/

## Editorial
- Editorial Standards: https://thescreenreport.com/editorial-standards/
- Corrections: https://thescreenreport.com/corrections/
- About: https://thescreenreport.com/about/

## Usage
You may cite The Screen Report with attribution and a link to the source article.
